title: Clockwork Fallout SMP
description: Clockwork Fallout SMP is a Create focused survival multiplayer mod pack.
body:
# Clockwork Fallout

**Clockwork Fallout** is a private modpack designed for a custom SMP server. It combines steampunk aesthetics with nuclear and tech-based progression, focusing on player collaboration and long-term gameplay.

The pack includes mods for steam-powered machines, industrial automation, and nuclear energy, creating a world where old-world design meets high-risk technology.
